title: workspace_trajectory.draft
description: DRAFT candidate schema for the per-trial workspace-trajectory artifact (workspace-observability-plan.md C2). UNTESTED ON GPU pilot kit -- this is a candidate to be frozen as v1 ONLY after the P0 data-shape memo. The artifact body is time-free and deterministically serialized; run wall-clock lives only in the sidecar. All downstream detectors are deterministic functions of this object.

mapping_version.description: Frozen mapping version; pins the layer-band rule, top-k discipline, readout tokens, and control-noun set.

pin.description: The pinned tuple (C2/D4): the auditable identity of the (model, lens, mapping) that produced this artifact.

model_revision.description: HF repo id @ revision (or an explicit UNPINNED-<reason> marker if the operator bypassed pinning).

lens_sha256.description: sha256 of the lens artifact bytes, or an explicit UNPINNED-<reason> marker.

layer_band.description: The declared workspace-layer band (D5). No universal constant: the default is a depth fraction resolved to concrete indices per model and RECORDED here.

rule.description: How the band was chosen, e.g. 'explicit' or 'depth_fraction:0.40-0.70'.

layers.description: Resolved concrete layer indices, ascending, unique.

top_k.description: Number of top readouts retained per frame (D5 fixed top-k).

prompt_set.description: Provenance of the prompt this trajectory was captured on.

positions.description: Per-position top-k frames over the declared layer band. Deterministic order (ascending index).

probe_readouts.description: Exact lens log-probs for the A.21 readout + control vocabulary, at scored (assistant-turn-start) positions. This is the deterministic substrate the A.21 detector consumes offline; top-k alone cannot carry 102 fixed-vocabulary log-probs. Optional: present only when capture emits probe readouts.

truncation.description: Size-cap disclosure (D5). Never silently drop: if the cap bit, truncated is true and the counts show what was kept.

token.description: Decoded token string at this position, or null if not recorded.

readouts.description: Top-k readouts, sorted by strength descending then token ascending (deterministic tie-break).

strength.description: Lens log-prob of the token at this (position, layer).

dropped_multitoken.description: Probe words that did not resolve to a single token under this tokenizer (per-model disclosure). Excluded from the mean.

readout_logprobs.description: Map readout-token -> lens log-prob (resolved tokens only).

control_logprobs.description: Lens log-prob per control noun, aligned to the frozen control_nouns file order; null marks a noun that did not resolve to a single token (skipped in the mean).
